title: paepalanthus elatus
intro: Paepalanthus elatus, also known as the tall paepalanthus, is a species of flowering plant in the family Eriocaulaceae, native to Brazil. The plant has been traditionally used in folk medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Paepalanthus elatus include its potential to treat respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its ability to reduce fever and alleviate pain. In traditional herbal preparations, Paepalanthus elatus is often used in infusions or decoctions, and its leaves and stems are dried and used to make teas or added to medicinal soups.
